message:
refactor(a11y): apply rustfmt formatting to tree.rs and a11y_tests.rs

Normalize code formatting across the ftui-a11y crate to satisfy rustfmt
consistency requirements:

tree.rs:
- Collapse single-line struct variants (RoleChanged, StateChanged,
  ParentChanged) from multi-line to inline form
- Condense the value_text unwrap chain in diff_state() to a single line

a11y_tests.rs:
- Reformat A11yNodeInfo constructor calls to use multi-line argument
  style when arguments exceed line width (builder_with_capacity_works,
  diff_detects_focus_gained/lost, tree_focused_id/root_id edge cases,
  ancestors_self_cycle_protection)
- Reformat long assertion chains (diff_detects_bounds_change,
  diff_detects_children_change) to multi-line assert! blocks
- Normalize let-binding line breaks for checkbox/slider node
  construction in diff_detects_state_change_checked/value tests
- Collapse short .with_name() chains onto constructor lines where they
  fit (diff_detects_description_added, diff_detects_shortcut_removed)
- Restructure parent-change test node construction for consistent
  chaining style (diff_detects_parent_change, diff_detects_parent_removed)
- Replace indexed loop `for i in 1..4` with idiomatic
  `for node in nodes.iter().skip(1).take(3)` in
  accessible_list_returns_parent_and_children
- Expand FakeList vec![...] constructor to multi-line items format

No behavioral changes; purely formatting and minor idiomatic improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
